mapper.select: SELECT TEMPLATE_ID AS templateId, TEMPLATE_NAME AS templateName, TEMPLATE_TYPE AS templateType, TEMPLATE_BODY AS templateBody, DESCRIPTION AS description, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_CODE_TEMPLATE WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_CODE_TEMPLATE ( TEMPLATE_ID, TEMPLATE_NAME, TEMPLATE_TYPE, TEMPLATE_BODY, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, SORT_ORDER, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.templateId}, #{dto.templateName}, #{dto.templateType}, #{dto.templateBody, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{dto.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.sortOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_CODE_TEMPLATE SET TEMPLATE_NAME = #{dto.templateName}, TEMPLATE_TYPE = #{dto.templateType}, TEMPLATE_BODY = #{dto.templateBody, jdbcType=CLOB}, DESCRIPTION = #{dto.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_YN = #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_ORDER = #{dto.sortOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CODE_TEMPLATE WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT TEMPLATE_ID AS templateId, TEMPLATE_NAME AS templateName, TEMPLATE_TYPE AS templateType, DESCRIPTION AS description, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_CODE_TEMPLATE
) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}

SELECT TEMPLATE_ID AS templateId, TEMPLATE_NAME AS templateName, TEMPLATE_TYPE AS templateType, DESCRIPTION AS description, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_CODE_TEMPLATE

SELECT TEMPLATE_ID AS templateId, TEMPLATE_NAME AS templateName, TEMPLATE_TYPE AS templateType, TEMPLATE_BODY AS templateBody, DESCRIPTION AS description, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_CODE_TEMPLATE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
